overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a stormy night environment. The character travels from a wooden dock across a beach and enters the village of Azamo Bay, navigating through streets and narrow paths. The footage features cinematic third-person camera following the character through traditional Japanese architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier extending over calm water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the distant shore

notable_agents.action: villager standing on the dock looking out at the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
thick wooden post used for mooring boats
dark calm water surrounding the dock
sandy beach and land visible in the distance
dark storm clouds covering the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden pier at night during a storm. The samurai character walks forward along the dock planks, passing a villager standing on the left. The water is calm and dark, with a sandy shoreline visible in the distance under heavy storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach leading to village entrance

events.description: steps off the wooden dock onto the sandy beach
slight turn to align with the village gate entrance

agents.ego_description: walking across the sand toward the large wooden village gate

entered.detail: pale sand covering the ground between dock and village
wooden palisade fence marking the village perimeter
small rustic wooden structure on the beach
large wooden gate marking the village entrance

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the dock to a sandy beach area. The camera walks across the sand toward a large wooden gate structure in the distance. Wooden fences line the left side and a small hut sits on the right. The storm clouds remain visible overhead as the character approaches the village entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street of Azamo Bay village

events.description: passing through the wooden gate into the village, location text 'AZAMO BAY' appears

agents.ego_description: entering the village through the main gate and walking along the central street lined with buildings

entered.detail: large wooden entrance gate with doors opening inward
road surface covered with bamboo matting
traditional Japanese wooden structures with tiled roofs
large rocky cliff rising behind the village
bamboo scaffolding along the left side of the street
illuminated paper lanterns hanging from building eaves

segments.scene_description: The character enters Azamo Bay village through the main gate, transitioning from beach to a street paved with bamboo matting. Traditional wooden buildings line both sides of the street, with hanging lanterns providing warm light. A large stone cliff face looms in the background, and bamboo scaffolding is visible on the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back path with wooden fences and vegetation

events.description: turning off the main street onto a narrower dirt path between buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating narrower paths between village buildings and vegetation

entered.detail: narrow walking path of packed dirt between structures
wooden plank fences lining the right side of the path
tall banner with symbol hanging from a wooden pole
large boulders and rock formations on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the main village street for a narrower dirt path surrounded by grass and vegetation. Wooden fences line the right side, and a tall banner flag becomes visible ahead. The path winds between traditional buildings and natural rock formations, with denser vegetation appearing as the character progresses toward another wooden gate in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stormy, dark coastline into the warm, structured environment of a traditional Japanese village. It begins on a wooden pier at night, following a samurai as he walks past a villager toward a distant sandy shoreline under heavy storm clouds. As the character transitions from the dock to the beach, the camera moves across the sand past wooden fences and a small hut toward a large gate. The scene then opens into the village of Azamo Bay, shifting from the open beach to a street paved with bamboo matting and lined with glowing lanterns and traditional wooden buildings beneath a looming stone cliff. Finally, the path narrows from the main street into a dirt trail surrounded by dense vegetation and rock formations, winding past a tall banner flag toward another wooden gate in the distance.
